title: Cousins Properties Announces Its Second Quarter 2026 Common Stock Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Cousins Properties announced that its Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of $0.32 per common share for Q2 2026, payable on July 16, 2026 to shareholders of record on July 6, 2026. The Atlanta-based REIT primarily invests in Class A office buildings in high-growth Sun Belt markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.32 per share, demonstrating consistent capital returns to shareholders and financial stability. Regular dividend announcements are typically viewed positively as they indicate the company's confidence in its cash flow generation and commitment to shareholder value.

title: Why One Real Estate Fund Dumped $62 Million of Cousins Properties Stock
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Resolution Capital sold 2.57 million shares (85% of its stake) in Cousins Properties during Q1 2026, valued at approximately $62.35 million. Despite the fund's exit, the article notes that Cousins Properties remains positioned as a potential office REIT winner due to its focus on premium Class A properties in high-growth Sun Belt markets, strong leasing pipeline, and solid balance sheet metrics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: While Resolution Capital significantly reduced its position (85% stake sale), the article presents a balanced view. The company faces headwinds from post-pandemic office sector challenges, but maintains competitive advantages through premium Sun Belt properties, strong leasing pipeline (1M sq ft), and the lowest leverage ratio among office REITs. Stock down 5% YTD underperforms S&P 500.
Listed as a top holding of Resolution Capital with $355.14 million (7.5% of AUM), indicating institutional confidence in the company.

title: Cousins Properties Announces Its First Quarter 2026 Common Stock Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Cousins Properties announced that its Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of $0.32 per common share for Q1 2026, payable on April 15, 2026 to shareholders of record on April 7, 2026. The Atlanta-based REIT invests primarily in Class A office buildings in high-growth Sun Belt markets.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its dividend payments at $0.32 per share for Q1 2026, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend announcements are typically viewed positively by income-focused investors and indicate operational confidence.
